quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.CfnAb:
A box plot.

For more information, see [Using box plots](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/box-plots.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Actio.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Chart.Description: The configuration settings of the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Colum.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Subti.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.boxplotvisual.Visua.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers..
